career.title: Website Developer
details: VarsaWeb: Building a modern web agency platform using Next.js. Developing a custom admin panel for content, portfolio, and client service management with secure authentication.

projects.title: Legian Medical Clinic Website
projects.description: A Laravel-based healthcare website platform designed for Legian Medical Clinic. Equipped with a content management system.
projects.longDescription:
This project is a comprehensive digital solution that I built, from the data architecture design stage (ERD & DFD) to final implementation using Laravel (PHP). The main focus of this project was to create a clinic information platform that was both informative for patients and highly manageable for clinic staff.

Behind the visitor interface, built using Blade templating, lies a robust back-end system (CMS) protected by layered authentication (Role-Based Access Control, including Super Admin). Through this admin panel, users can perform CRUD operations on doctor data, services, FAQs, and even configure page content.

The technical value-adds I'm proud of in this project are:

Multilingual Architecture: Seamless implementation of dual-language features (Indonesian & English) using a custom Translation Service for all dynamic content.

Activity Logging: An integrated tracking system that records every admin activity to ensure security and transparency of data changes.
This project demonstrated my ability to design mid-scale relational applications that are secure, scalable, and compliant with real-world business flows.

projects.title: Savio Portfolio Website
projects.description: Personal portfolio website built using Next.js 15 with a modern, responsive, light theme design
projects.longDescription:
This project is a digital representation of my profile and work, built from the ground up with a focus on performance and user interface (UI/UX) aesthetics. Using Next.js and TypeScript, the project structure is divided into modular components such as the Hero, About, Projects, and Resume sections.

The most challenging and exciting feature I worked on in this project was the implementation of visual interactions. Rather than simply creating static pages, I developed my own animation logic using custom hooks for parallax effects and scroll animations. All styling is neatly managed using CSS Modules to prevent style clashes between components, resulting in a clean, easy-to-manage codebase and a highly responsive website.

projects.title: VarsaWeb Comany Profile Website
projects.description: VarsaWeb is a full-stack business website platform that comes with a custom content management system (CMS).
projects.longDescription:
VarsaWeb is an integrated business website solution I developed to address front-end (company profile) and back-end (data management) needs within a single codebase.

The application was built using Next.js, TypeScript, and Tailwind CSS to create a responsive, modern, and professional user interface. Behind the scenes, I implemented Prisma ORM for type-safe database management and leveraged Next.js Server Actions for efficient data manipulation.

VarsaWeb's main selling point is its admin dashboard system, protected by NextAuth.js. Through this admin panel, users can easily perform CRUD (Create, Read, Update, Delete) operations on various business entities such as service lists, portfolio projects, pricing schemes, testimonials, and even monitor incoming messages from website visitors (inbox). This project demonstrates my ability to build dynamic, secure, scalable information systems that are ready for use in real-world business scenarios.

projects.title: Arya Intaran Porfolio Website
projects.description: An interactive professional portfolio website for Arya Intaran, a Full Stack Engineer. Built with Next.js, Tailwind CSS, and Supabase to showcase his profile, career experience, and latest projects.
projects.longDescription:
This project is a professional portfolio website for Arya Intaran, a Computer Science graduate specializing in Full Stack Web Development, IT Support, and Data Entry. The website is developed using a modern technology stack, leveraging Next.js for server-side performance and optimal SEO, alongside Tailwind CSS for a highly responsive user interface design. To provide an engaging user experience, the site features interactive and smooth animations powered by GSAP.

Beyond serving as a digital showcase for Arya's biography, educational background, career journey, and technical skills (such as React, Node.js, Laravel, and Supabase), this project integrates Supabase as a Backend-as-a-Service (BaaS) for robust data management. The architecture also includes a custom admin panel with a WYSIWYG editor, allowing for dynamic, secure, and seamless content updates to the portfolio.
